meta.title: How Nano Banana Pro & Kling Changed AI FIlmmaking
meta.description:
AI Filmmaking is now easier than ever with Nano Banana & Kling AI
Try out Artlist  👉 https://artlist.io/artlist-70446/?artlist_aid=DanKieft_3875&utm_source=affiliate_p&utm_medium=DanKieft_3875&utm_campaign=DanKieft_3875

Making cinematic AI shots is now simpler than ever before. With NanoMilena Pro, you can generate any image with incredibly sharp details, which I use for storyboarding, concepting, and creating reference images. For video, I'm using Kling AI due to its many great releases, making it a powerful ai video generator for creating ai film and ai generated video projects. You can now easily create stunning ai videos with these tools.


Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts & chat about AI
👉 https://www.skool.com/nextgenai

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
